creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Please close this PR, as I've submitted ports/175480 which includes
the fix for poudriere. 

Thanks in advance. 

BR, 

Ralf 

On 20-01-2013
10:51, Edwin Groothuis wrote: 

> Maintainer of dns/powerdns,

Please note that PR ports/175448 has just been submitted.

contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix

on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a
committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be
found at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/175448
